build.command: python3 scripts/run_memory_guarded.py --max-tree-rss-mib 12000 --min-available-mib 4096 --poll-seconds 0.5 --json /tmp/cuboctahedron_ap16be_bad_mask_cover_guard.json -- bash -lc 'export LEAN_NUM_THREADS=1; export LAKE_JOBS=1; timeout 180s lake build Cuboctahedron.Generated.Translation.TwoSource.SupportFamilies.BadMaskCover'

decision: The proof-valued bad-mask cover interface is accepted. It lets future generated mask-cube/Farkas leaves prove the AP16AZ membership premise without exposing per-mask denominator witnesses at the positive-survivor classifier layer.
